_metadata.purpose: Slack app manifest for triage-bot. Paste this at https://api.slack.com/apps -> Create New App -> From manifest.
after_install: Copy the Signing Secret from Basic Information -> wrangler secret put SLACK_SIGNING_SECRET
Copy the Bot Token (xoxb-...) from OAuth & Permissions -> wrangler secret put SLACK_BOT_TOKEN
Set Event Subscriptions Request URL to the deployed Worker URL
Invite the bot to all 4 alert channels + #triage-bot-debug + #triage-bot-health + #triage-bot-requests
Fill the channel IDs into kb/config.json

display_information.name: triage-bot
display_information.description: Investigates production alerts and DMs Ben with findings
